ValidationRule.description: Website creation date (ProSpace member since) is mandatory when website role is ProSpace Temp or ProSpace
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISNULL( WebsiteCreationDate__c ), OR( ISPICKVAL(WebsiteRole__c,'3') , ISPICKVAL(WebsiteRole__c,'5') ), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z9hS'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z6UE'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z6UC'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000s3v6') , $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Website creation date (ProSpace member since) is mandatory when website role is ProSpace Temp or ProSpace
